heading: Rollover of gain from qualified small business stock to another qualified small business stock
label: 1045 Rollover of gain from qualified small business stock to another qualified small business stock

children.text: the cost of any qualified small business stock purchased by the taxpayer during the 60-day period beginning on the date of such sale, reduced by
any portion of such cost previously taken into account under this section.

children.heading: Qualified small business stock
children.label: 1 Qualified small business stock
children.text: The term “qualified small business stock” has the meaning given such term by section 1202(c).

children.heading: Purchase
children.label: 2 Purchase
children.text: A taxpayer shall be treated as having purchased any property if, but for paragraph (3), the unadjusted basis of such property in the hands of the taxpayer would be its cost (within the meaning of section 1012).

children.heading: Basis adjustments
children.label: 3 Basis adjustments
children.text: If gain from any sale is not recognized by reason of subsection (a), such gain shall be applied to reduce (in the order acquired) the basis for determining gain or loss of any qualified small business stock which is purchased by the taxpayer during the 60-day period described in subsection (a).

children.label: A
children.text: the taxpayer’s holding period for such stock and the stock referred to in subsection (a)(1) shall be determined without regard to section 1223, and

children.label: B
children.text: only the first 6 months of the taxpayer’s holding period for the stock referred to in subsection (a)(1) shall be taken into account for purposes of applying section 1202(c)(2).

children.heading: Certain rules to apply
children.label: 5 Certain rules to apply
children.text: Rules similar to the rules of subsections (f), (g), (h), (i), (j), and (k) of section 1202 shall apply.
